## Summary

Describe the user-visible and architectural change.

## Risk and compatibility

- [ ] Existing API routes and `NEXUS_*` settings remain compatible, or the migration is documented.
- [ ] Security, privacy, session-state, and tool-permission effects were reviewed.
- [ ] Failure and rollback behavior is understood.

## Verification

- [ ] `make quality` passes locally.
- [ ] Tests cover success, boundary, and failure behavior.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog entries are updated.
- [ ] No secrets, generated caches, or local databases are included.
